title: Weather
description:
Beautiful weather at a glance. **Weather** brings live conditions, multi-day forecasts, and a compact temperature widget to your Brika dashboard, on backgrounds that shift with the sky.

- **Current Weather** — temperature, feels-like, humidity, wind, and pressure over a gradient that reflects the conditions
- **Forecast** — up to 7 days of highs, lows, and icons, laid out to fit the space
- **Temperature** — a minimal current-temp widget for the tightest corners

Every brick adapts from 1×1 to full width. Powered by the free [Open-Meteo API](https://open-meteo.com/), so there is no API key to configure.
